summary: Classified the 10 open PR inventory candidates using the hydrated preflight artifact. Security-shaped PRs are quarantined with route_security; the remaining non-security PRs are kept non-mutating because this is an inventory shard, merge/fix are blocked, and closure is not boringly safe.

actions.reason: The PR appears covered by the hydrated merged fix path, but protected maintainer signal and stale/failing state make non-mutating classification the safe plan outcome.
Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Security-shaped evidence on an open PR requires scoped quarantine instead of dedupe, closeout, merge, or fix planning.
The PR touches Discord Activity auth and gateway surfaces with explicit security findings, so it belongs in central security handling.
Open systemd PR has security-shaped findings and unresolved review blockers, so only security routing is appropriate.
This is an independent formatting PR in an inventory shard, not a duplicate cluster member.
The PR changes gateway plugin route loading with explicit security-shaped findings, so it should be quarantined to central security handling.
The PR has explicit security-shaped WhatsApp auth/logout evidence, so ProjectClownfish should not close, merge, or repair it.
Related WhatsApp QR work, but the artifact does not prove a safe duplicate/superseded closeout.

Although the compact item matrix did not pre-mark #67820 as security-sensitive, the hydrated PR comments contain explicit security-shaped evidence, so scoped route_security is the conservative boundary action.
